name: HMIS Bhadravati (FY 065)
events: 15 Oct 1939 HMIS Bhadravati (Lt. H.M. Clark, RIN) was involved in a collision with the British merchant Warina (3120 GRT, built 1918) off Karachi. Bhadravati was holed above the water and her stern was twisted.
27 Oct 1939 HMIS Bhadravati (Lt. H.M. Clark, RIN) was docked at Bombay.
